programme.desc: The neighbours of a frontier family turn on them when it&amp;amp;amp;amp;apos;s suspected their adopted daughter was originally stolen from a Native American tribe.

programme.title: A Fistful of Dynamite
programme.desc: At the time of the Mexican Revolution, an explosives expert teams up with a greedy bandit to rob a national bank, but accidentally becomes a revolutionary hero against his will.

programme.title: The Missouri Breaks
programme.desc: In the untamed territory of Montana, a gang of cattle thieves seek revenge when one of its members is killed by a wealthy rancher.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: Matilda is a super-smart little girl who&amp;apos;s woefully misunderstood by her parents, her brother, and an evil school principal. With the help of a wonderful teacher, Matilda discovers she doesn&amp;apos;t have to get mad to get even.

programme.title: The Guns of Navarone
programme.desc: In 1943 a team of crack commandos are assembled for a seemingly impossible mission: destroy the German guns on the Greek Island of Navarone.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a purposely bad team so they&amp;apos;ll lose and she can move them to Florida. But when the plot is uncovered, they start winning just to spite her.

programme.title: Major League II
programme.desc: The unlikeliest winning team in baseball is back, but success has seen these cocky oddballs grow soft as they eye up the World Series.

programme.title: Major League: Back to the Minors
programme.desc: The South Carolina Buzz is about to face off against the Minnesota Twins. Unfortunately, the Buzz are nine players short of a dream team.

programme.title: Jumanji

programme.title: A Man for All Seasons
programme.desc: The story of Sir Thomas More, who stood up to King Henry VIII when the King rejected the Roman Catholic Church. As More stood by his principles, the King responded with grave charges of treason.

programme.title: Heat
programme.desc: A career criminal considers getting out of the business after one last score, while an obsessive cop desperately tries to put him behind bars.

programme.title: Nothing in Common
programme.desc: On his way up the corporate ladder, David Basner confronts his greatest challenge - his father.

programme.title: Silverado
programme.desc: A group of misfit cowboys come together to right wrongs, fight corruption and bring down an evil sheriff in the town of Silverado.

programme.title: Tommy
programme.desc: Based on The Who&amp;apos;s 1969 concept album. Young Tommy is rendered blind, deaf, and mute after witnessing a traumatic event. When he stumbles upon a pinball machine, fame and fortune follow as he becomes a pinball champion and the messiah of a religious cult.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: Over the course of 30 years, a widowed mother and her daughter navigate their complicated relationship and life's dramas.

programme.desc: The gritty true story of a New York cop who blew the whistle on rampant corruption in the force, only to have his comrades turn against him.

programme.title: New York, New York
programme.desc: A smooth-talking musician and a determined lounge singer embark on a rocky romance as their careers begin a long uphill climb.

programme.title: Arizona Dream

programme.title: ...And Justice for All
programme.desc: A lawyer, disgusted with legal corruption, is forced to defend a judge he despises in a rape trial. If he doesn't do it, the judge will have him disbarred.

programme.title: Braveheart
programme.desc: The tale of William Wallace, the 13th Century patriot who united Scotland, rousing it to fight against an oppressive English rule.

programme.title: White Nights
programme.desc: A Russian ballet star who has defected is forced by a twist of fate back to the USSR.

programme.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
programme.desc: A New York socialite's carefree existence catches the attention of a young writer who has moved into her apartment building.
